name: Masoud
intro: I am a Software Engineer specializing in JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and Next.js with 5+ years of professional experience building scalable enterprise web applications. Focused on frontend architecture, performance, developer experience, and creating maintainable systems that scale. Experienced in building API-driven applications, reusable component libraries, authentication systems, and modern fullstack solutions using GraphQL and Node.js. Passionate about clean engineering, practical problem-solving, and building reliable user experiences through thoughtful architecture, collaboration, and AI-driven technologies.
